hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams connect failed Travel Rule message data with originator, beneficiary, routing, and case evidence to support structured reviews and audit-ready workflows.

problem_title: Failed Travel Rule messages delay compliance
problem_description: Compliance teams face inefficiencies when Travel Rule messages fail and remain outside structured review workflows. This results in slower exception handling, weaker audit evidence, and fragmented oversight of originator and beneficiary data for ongoing compliance evaluations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes originator, beneficiary and routing data from failed Travel Rule messages into structured cases with audit evidence and compliance rule context so teams can review and resolve exceptions efficiently.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exception to case review
workflow_description: SFTY channels Travel Rule exceptions through compliance reviews, case creation, evidence collection and decision logging to support structured regulatory workflows for VASPs.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule data, routing status, exceptions, and compliance rules into one operational workflow for VASPs to manage message completeness and regulatory reviews efficiently.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle failed message reviews?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes failed or incomplete Travel Rule messages into cases, enabling structured compliance review, decision logging, exception handling and escalation within a connected workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit evidence by maintaining detailed case histories, decision logs, supporting documents and message metadata for regulatory reviews and internal compliance validation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing Travel Rule providers, integrating their outputs into a centralized compliance layer without disrupting current messaging or routing infrastructure.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule messaging providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but consolidates their outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and reports for clearer compliance control.
final_title: Structure Travel Rule failed message reviews
final_description: Review how SFTY links failed message data, originator details, routing status and audit evidence into one controlled workflow.
